TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Na-low-pi, title = Na-low-pi, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Na-low-pi} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == Na-low-pi "Ing akamu, Nairobi" nu Tang-beya kanatal angangan nu Ken-ya, u nu tabakiay a tukuy nu Bya-cow, pakala tu 30 a emang ku tademaw. Na-low-pi a nipangangan nu tizaay a Ma-say a binacadan a kamu "Enkare Nyirobi" makayniay "ciedetay a nanum". Ś•ąśīõśĮĒ(ŤčĪŤ™ě:Nairobi) Enkare Nyirobi ŤÄĆšĺÜÁöĄ. nilaculan u Na-low-pi tini capi nu teleklan. nika tini katalakawan tu 1660m ku buyu' sisa dimiad tu akiti' nu Bay-cow caay kalecad. tademaw amin hatu u Amilika ku kamu atu S-wa-si-li ku kamu "Bey-cow a nutimulan u tungus a kamu". Na-low-pi patizeng i 1899 a mihcaan, teka sanay sa nu U-kan-ta a pabelian nu silamalay, situngusy tu nu Ken-ya nu timulan a tukay Mung-pa-say atu U-kan-ta a laed nu pabeliay. 1900 a zidayan balal silibung zikuz malinngatu tu muliyaw patizeng, tawya u Ing tungusay nu Tung-bey nu midebungay a klala' malingatu tu patizang, Na-low-pi mala muliyaway patiza tu niyazu' nu midebungy, 1907 a mihcaan Ing tungusay nu Tung-bey nu midebungay pala angangan han ku Na-low-pi. . 1963 a mkihcaan zikuz nu pisakaku nu Ken-ya, tulin sa pala angangan ku tiniay. Na-low-pi izaw tu ayza ku nipatizeng tu kanatalay a pahikukian. iayaw 1930 a ziday atu 1940 a zidayan, Ing-kow tayni i Ken-ya hatu micukaymas tu I-s-al a pahikukian "Eastleigh Airport", uyni a pahikukian nanu Ing-kow Nan-an-pu-tun tayza Ha-wang-cyaw nu kahenulan a paniyulan. satu atu Ci-su-mu "Ken-ya satipay a minatu" laed napaculil tu bey-tin tu saculilan a zazan. 1963 (Eastleigh Airport), . Na-low-pi nu kasizuma tini i tahakay nu mauzipay a kitizaan midiput-Na-low-pi kanatal a piidangan. mapulungay a kanatal a tademaw-su "UNHABITAT" atu pupuay tu hekal "UNEP" nu pulung patizeng i Na-low-pi. kanatal pahukukian a saakaput "ICAO" sawalian nu Bey-cow, nutimulay nu mikawaway itini a tukay patizeng. (UNHABITAT)ŤąáÁíįŚĘÉÁĹ≤(UNEP) (ICAO) . naemekan ś≠∑ŚŹ≤ Na-low-pi-en-mu-pa-ka-si a pahikukian "Nairobi Embakasi Airport" i 1958 a mihca 8 a bulad nu sazikuzay mala tung-tu nu Ken-ya ci Ay-ow-lin.Pa-lin "Nairobi Embakasi Airport" musakamu palabang. kuna ci I-li-sa-pay hungti ku mitelungay, nika zayhan ai Aw-ta-li-ya mautel caay tu pilihiza tu pabinawlan a lisin. zikuz zuma a kadubaan a zazan patizeng tu ayzaay a pahukukian a luma', mahiza sumad han pangangan tu nu ayzaay a ngangan. (Nairobi Embakasi Airport)śĖľ1958ŚĻī5 . makakenis tu sakawawan Na-low-pi a tuykay iza ku cacay nahedekay a sin-ce kuwan kitizaan a puenengan. Na-low-pi kuwan i Ken-ya makay zumaay a kitizaan pina a lamangan a kawaw caay kalecad. uyni a sakuwan hamin nu tukayay. uyza cacay a kitiza a situngus, Na-low-pi-se-i-huy. Na-low-pi a kuwan pasasisumaen "kitizaan", katukuh 2007 a mihcaan, yu tulu ku kakitizaan patizeng. i 2010 a mihcaan, kilul tu maluhay a nipalulican, Na-low-pi pasumad tu ngangan u cacay a sakuwan. Na-low-pi sakuwan iza 8 ku pisingkiwan. pisingkiwan ngangan hakay caay kalecad ku kakesis a ngangan, mahiniay Starehe pisingkiwan tungus tebad nu dademecan a kitizaan, Langata pisingkiwan ci-pey-la makakenis, pisingkiwan pasasizuma ku Kamukunji Pumwani. ,ťÄôś®£Starehe ,Langata Kamukunji PumwaniťÉ®. malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == na-r~…ĺow-pi "iŇč akamu, nairobi" nu taŇč-b…ôa kanatar~…ĺ aŇčaŇčan nu k…ôn-ja, u nu tabakiaj a tukuj nu bja- ¶ow, pakar~…ĺa tu ** a …ômaŇč ku tad…ômaw. na-r~…ĺow-pi a nipaŇčaŇčan nu tizaaj a ma-saj a bina ¶adan a kamu "…ônkar…ô njirobi" makajniaj " ¶i…ôd…ôtaj a nanum". ***(**:nairobi) …ônkar…ô njirobi ***. nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan u na-r~…ĺow-pi tini ¶api nu t…ôr~…ĺ…ôkr~…ĺan. nika tini katar~…ĺakawan tu ****m ku buju Ē~ ° sisa dimiad tu akiti Ē~ ° nu baj- ¶ow ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad. tad…ômaw amin ńßatu u amir~…ĺika ku kamu atu s-wa-si-r~…ĺi ku kamu "b…ô- ¶ow a nutimur~…ĺan u tuŇčus a kamu". na-r~…ĺow-pi patiz…ôŇč i **** a mińß ¶aan, t…ôka sanaj sa nu u-kan-ta a pab…ôr~…ĺian nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj, situŇčusj tu nu k…ôn-ja nu timur~…ĺan a tukaj muŇč-pa-saj atu u-kan-ta a r~…ĺa…ôd nu pab…ôr~…ĺiaj. **** a zidajan bar~…ĺar~…ĺ sir~…ĺibuŇč zikuz mar~…ĺinŇčatu tu mur~…ĺijaw patiz…ôŇč, tawja u iŇč tuŇčusaj nu tuŇč-b…ô nu mid…ôbuŇčaj a kr~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu patizaŇč, na-r~…ĺow-pi mar~…ĺa mur~…ĺijawaj patiza tu nijazu Ē~ ° nu mid…ôbuŇčj, **** a mińß ¶aan iŇč tuŇčusaj nu tuŇč-b…ô nu mid…ôbuŇčaj par~…ĺa aŇčaŇčan ńßan ku na-r~…ĺow-pi. . **** a mkińß ¶aan zikuz nu pisakaku nu k…ôn-ja, tur~…ĺin sa par~…ĺa aŇčaŇčan ku tiniaj. na-r~…ĺow-pi izaw tu ajza ku nipatiz…ôŇč tu kanatar~…ĺaj a pańßikukian. iajaw **** a zidaj atu **** a zidajan, iŇč-kow tajni i k…ôn-ja ńßatu mi ¶ukajmas tu i-s-ar~…ĺ a pańßikukian "…ôastr~…ĺ…ôigńß airport", ujni a pańßikukian nanu iŇč-kow nan-an-pu-tun tajza ńßa-waŇč- ¶jaw nu kańß…ônur~…ĺan a panijur~…ĺan. satu atu ¶i-su-mu "k…ôn-ja satipaj a minatu" r~…ĺa…ôd napa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ tu b…ô-tin tu sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan a zazan. **** (…ôastr~…ĺ…ôigńß airport), . na-r~…ĺow-pi nu kasizuma tini i tańßakaj nu mauzipaj a kitizaan midiput-na-r~…ĺow-pi kanatar~…ĺ a piidaŇčan. mapur~…ĺuŇčaj a kanatar~…ĺ a tad…ômaw-su "unńßabitat" atu pupuaj tu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ "un…ôp" nu pur~…ĺuŇč patiz…ôŇč i na-r~…ĺow-pi. kanatar~…ĺ pańßukukian a saakaput "i ¶ao" sawar~…ĺian nu b…ô- ¶ow, nutimur~…ĺaj nu mikawawaj itini a tukaj patiz…ôŇč. (unńßabitat)****(un…ôp) (i ¶ao) . na…ôm…ôkan ** na-r~…ĺow-pi-…ôn-mu-pa-ka-si a pańßikukian "nairobi …ômbakasi airport" i **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad nu sazikuzaj mar~…ĺa tuŇč-tu nu k…ôn-ja ¶i aj-ow-r~…ĺin.pa-r~…ĺin "nairobi …ômbakasi airport" musakamu par~…ĺabaŇč. kuna ¶i i-r~…ĺi-sa-paj ńßuŇčti ku mit…ôr~…ĺuŇčaj, nika zajńßan ai aw-ta-r~…ĺi-ja maut…ôr~…ĺ ¶aaj tu pir~…ĺińßiza tu pabinawr~…ĺan a r~…ĺisin. zikuz zuma a kadubaan a zazan patiz…ôŇč tu ajzaaj a pańßukukian a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, mańßiza sumad ńßan paŇčaŇčan tu nu ajzaaj a ŇčaŇčan. (nairobi …ômbakasi airport)******* . makak…ônis tu sakawawan na-r~…ĺow-pi a tujkaj iza ku ¶a ¶aj nańß…ôd…ôkaj a sin- ¶…ô kuwan kitizaan a pu…ôn…ôŇčan. na-r~…ĺow-pi kuwan i k…ôn-ja makaj zumaaj a kitizaan pina a r~…ĺamaŇčan a kawaw ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad. ujni a sakuwan ńßamin nu tukajaj. ujza ¶a ¶aj a kitiza a situŇčus, na-r~…ĺow-pi-s…ô-i-ńßuj. na-r~…ĺow-pi a kuwan pasasisuma…ôn "kitizaan", katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan, ju tur~…ĺu ku kakitizaan patiz…ôŇč. i **** a mińß ¶aan, kir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu mar~…ĺuńßaj a nipar~…ĺur~…ĺi ¶an, na-r~…ĺow-pi pasumad tu ŇčaŇčan u ¶a ¶aj a sakuwan. na-r~…ĺow-pi sakuwan iza * ku pisiŇčkiwan. pisiŇčkiwan ŇčaŇčan ńßakaj ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku kak…ôsis a ŇčaŇčan, mańßiniaj star…ôńß…ô pisiŇčkiwan tuŇčus t…ôbad nu dad…ôm…ô ¶an a kitizaan, r~…ĺaŇčata pisiŇčkiwan ¶i-p…ô-r~…ĺa makak…ônis, pisiŇčkiwan pasasizuma ku kamukunji pumwani. ,**star…ôńß…ô ,r~…ĺaŇčata kamukunji pumwani*. mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
S.FORM: == kakiliman == Na-low-pi "Ing akamu, Nairobi" nu Tang-beya kanatal angangan nu Ken-ya, u nu tabakiay a tukuy nu Bya-cow, pakala tu 30 a emang ku tademaw. Na-low-pi a nipangangan nu tizaay a Ma-say a binacadan a kamu "Enkare Nyirobi" makayniay "ciedetay a nanum". Ś•ąśīõśĮĒ(ŤčĪŤ™ě:Nairobi) Enkare Nyirobi ŤÄĆšĺÜÁöĄ. nilaculan u Na-low-pi tini capi nu teleklan. nika tini katalakawan tu 1660m ku buyu' sisa dimiad tu akiti' nu Bay-cow caay kalecad. tademaw amin hatu u Amilika ku kamu atu S-wa-si-li ku kamu "Bey-cow a nutimulan u tungus a kamu". Na-low-pi patizeng i 1899 a mihcaan, teka sanay sa nu U-kan-ta a pabelian nu silamalay, situngusy tu nu Ken-ya nu timulan a tukay Mung-pa-say atu U-kan-ta a laed nu pabeliay. 1900 a zidayan balal silibung zikuz malinngatu tu muliyaw patizeng, tawya u Ing tungusay nu Tung-bey nu midebungay a klala' malingatu tu patizang, Na-low-pi mala muliyaway patiza tu niyazu' nu midebungy, 1907 a mihcaan Ing tungusay nu Tung-bey nu midebungay pala angangan han ku Na-low-pi. . 1963 a mkihcaan zikuz nu pisakaku nu Ken-ya, tulin sa pala angangan ku tiniay. Na-low-pi izaw tu ayza ku nipatizeng tu kanatalay a pahikukian. iayaw 1930 a ziday atu 1940 a zidayan, Ing-kow tayni i Ken-ya hatu micukaymas tu I-s-al a pahikukian "Eastleigh Airport", uyni a pahikukian nanu Ing-kow Nan-an-pu-tun tayza Ha-wang-cyaw nu kahenulan a paniyulan. satu atu Ci-su-mu "Ken-ya satipay a minatu" laed napaculil tu bey-tin tu saculilan a zazan. 1963 (Eastleigh Airport), . Na-low-pi nu kasizuma tini i tahakay nu mauzipay a kitizaan midiput-Na-low-pi kanatal a piidangan. mapulungay a kanatal a tademaw-su "UNHABITAT" atu pupuay tu hekal "UNEP" nu pulung patizeng i Na-low-pi. kanatal pahukukian a saakaput "ICAO" sawalian nu Bey-cow, nutimulay nu mikawaway itini a tukay patizeng. (UNHABITAT)ŤąáÁíįŚĘÉÁĹ≤(UNEP) (ICAO) . naemekan ś≠∑ŚŹ≤ Na-low-pi-en-mu-pa-ka-si a pahikukian "Nairobi Embakasi Airport" i 1958 a mihca 8 a bulad nu sazikuzay mala tung-tu nu Ken-ya ci Ay-ow-lin.Pa-lin "Nairobi Embakasi Airport" musakamu palabang. kuna ci I-li-sa-pay hungti ku mitelungay, nika zayhan ai Aw-ta-li-ya mautel caay tu pilihiza tu pabinawlan a lisin. zikuz zuma a kadubaan a zazan patizeng tu ayzaay a pahukukian a luma', mahiza sumad han pangangan tu nu ayzaay a ngangan. (Nairobi Embakasi Airport)śĖľ1958ŚĻī5 . makakenis tu sakawawan Na-low-pi a tuykay iza ku cacay nahedekay a sin-ce kuwan kitizaan a puenengan. Na-low-pi kuwan i Ken-ya makay zumaay a kitizaan pina a lamangan a kawaw caay kalecad. uyni a sakuwan hamin nu tukayay. uyza cacay a kitiza a situngus, Na-low-pi-se-i-huy. Na-low-pi a kuwan pasasisumaen "kitizaan", katukuh 2007 a mihcaan, yu tulu ku kakitizaan patizeng. i 2010 a mihcaan, kilul tu maluhay a nipalulican, Na-low-pi pasumad tu ngangan u cacay a sakuwan. Na-low-pi sakuwan iza 8 ku pisingkiwan. pisingkiwan ngangan hakay caay kalecad ku kakesis a ngangan, mahiniay Starehe pisingkiwan tungus tebad nu dademecan a kitizaan, Langata pisingkiwan ci-pey-la makakenis, pisingkiwan pasasizuma ku Kamukunji Pumwani. ,ťÄôś®£Starehe ,Langata Kamukunji PumwaniťÉ®. malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan

nipaŇčaŇčan nu tizaaj a ma-saj a bina ¶adan a kamu "…ônkar…ô njirobi" makajniaj " ¶i…ôd…ôtaj a nanum". ***(**:nairobi) …ônkar…ô njirobi ***. nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan u na-r~…ĺow-pi tini ¶api nu t…ôr~…ĺ…ôkr~…ĺan. nika tini katar~…ĺakawan tu ****m ku buju Ē~ ° sisa dimiad tu akiti Ē~ ° nu baj- ¶ow ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad. tad…ômaw amin ńßatu u amir~…ĺika ku kamu atu s-wa-si-r~…ĺi ku kamu "b…ô- ¶ow a midiput-na-r~…ĺow-pi kanatar~…ĺ a piidaŇčan. mapur~…ĺuŇčaj a kanatar~…ĺ a tad…ômaw-su "unńßabitat" atu pupuaj tu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ "un…ôp" nu pur~…ĺuŇč patiz…ôŇč i na-r~…ĺow-pi. kanatar~…ĺ pańßukukian a saakaput "i ¶ao" sawar~…ĺian nu b…ô- ¶ow, nutimur~…ĺaj nu mikawawaj itini a tukaj patiz…ôŇč.
